meaning: n.罗马传说中的贞妇名,贞节的模范
examples: In 1850 Lucretia Mott published her discourse on women, arguing in a treatise for women to have equal political and legal rights and for changes in the married women's property laws.
The Holy Box was released the same year by Lucretia Records including exclusive acoustic tracks.
The Rape of Lucrece (1594) is a narrative poem by William Shakespeare about the legendary Lucretia.
Lucy Lawless, who plays Lucretia in the show, talks about Spartacus Legends and gaming in the exclusive video below.
